commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Song of Songs 8:13 You that dwell in the gardens, the companions listen for your voice: let me hear it. The seventh morning is come, and I must depart to the mountains, chap. Christ, before his ascension, exhorts his Church to present her petitions. He is always ready to hear her, and to grant her aid, in every emergency. Ambrose, de Virg. The virtuous pray that her requests may be granted, (Haydock) and are eager to know what they are. (Menochius).
